Derived from the spec's critical inclination of 63.4 degrees and an Argument of Perigee of 270 degrees, forcing apogee at exactly the northern maximum latitude.

Derived mathematically from the spec's Semi-Major Axis (42164.17 km) and Eccentricity (0.28). Apogee radius is ~53970 km, minus Earth's radius (~6378 km) yields an altitude of ~47592 km, which fits within the 46000-49000 bound.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Tundra orbit specifications created via setup_task.sh. The expected target longitude (-105.0) and output file paths exactly match the explicit instructions generated for the agent. Furthermore, the required latitude (63.4) and target altitude range (46000 to 49000) are accurate physical derivatives of the given Semi-Major Axis (42164.17 km), Eccentricity (0.28), Argument of Perigee (270 deg), and Inclination (63.4 deg).
